meta.title: Asor & Co. Attorneys | Urban Renewal & Real Estate Tax - Jerusalem
meta.description: Asor & Co. Law Firm in Jerusalem. Experts in urban renewal (Pinui Binui), TAMA 38, real estate taxation, and income tax. Leading 9 projects with 3,100+ new apartments.
meta.og_title: Asor & Co. Attorneys | Urban Renewal & Real Estate Tax - Jerusalem

hero.tagline: Experts in Urban Renewal & Real Estate Taxation
hero.sub_tagline: Professional legal counsel from the first step to receiving the keys

about.paragraph1: Asor & Co. Law Firm is located in Ram Tower, Jerusalem, and includes eight attorneys with deep expertise in real estate transactions, urban renewal, and real estate taxation.
about.paragraph2: The firm specializes in representing residents in Pinui Binui (evacuation-construction) and TAMA 38 demolition-reconstruction projects, with extensive experience in dozens of projects in Jerusalem and surrounding areas — from early planning stages through final agreements and obtaining building permits.
about.role1: Chairman of the Urban Renewal Committee at the Jerusalem Bar Association
about.role2: Deputy Chair, Real Estate Taxation Committee at the Jerusalem Bar Association
about.role3: Alternate Member of the General Tax Committee

projects.section_subtitle: The firm manages leading urban renewal projects in Jerusalem and Beit Shemesh

commitments.section_subtitle: We represent the full interests of residents and property owners, ensuring every demand is met
commitments.card1: Building height and technical specifications for new apartments
commitments.card3: Quality architectural design and green spaces
commitments.card4: Elevators and water pumps under strict Halachic supervision
commitments.card6: Any additional demand with majority consent of property owners

approach.section_subtitle: Four principles that guide every legal engagement
approach.q1_text: We believe in determined representation of property owners, rigorously protecting their interests at every stage of the project.
approach.q2_text: Quality urban renewal begins with legal counsel that knows every clause in the agreement — and where the risks hide.
approach.q3_text: Every project is unique. We tailor the legal strategy to the structure of the residents' group and their specific needs.
approach.q4_text: Combining legal representation with real-estate-tax expertise saves residents significant sums — often tens of thousands of shekels.

contact.section_subtitle: We're happy to assist you with any question

accessibility.statement_body:
Accessibility Statement

Asor & Co. – Attorneys at Law is committed to enabling every person, including people with disabilities, to use this website equally, fully, and with dignity.

Accessibility Standard

This website complies with the Israeli Equal Rights for Persons with Disabilities Regulations (Accessibility Adjustments for Services), 2013, in accordance with Israeli Standard SI 5568 at WCAG 2.0 Level AA.

Accessibility Features

  • Text size adjustment
  • Color contrast modification
  • Link highlighting
  • Animation pause
  • Readable font
  • Large cursor
  • Full keyboard navigation
  • Screen reader support

Accessibility Inquiries

If you encounter an accessibility issue on this website, please contact us:

Phone: 02-5000275
Email: office@asor-law.com
Address: 17 Nachum Haftzadi St., Ram Tower - Floor 11, Jerusalem

Statement last updated: April 2026
accessibility.keyboard_info:
Keyboard Navigation:
Tab - Move between elements
Shift+Tab - Move to previous element
Enter - Activate button/link
Escape - Close window/menu
Arrows - Navigate lists
